			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Model' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1287059388792_713362_16239' name='Business rules'>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286173066837_69698_3738' name='Check user permissions'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307536_986018_3590'/>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307520_571072_3582'/>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307520_446265_3583'/>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307536_940998_3587'/>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307536_9777_3588'/>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307536_564299_3586'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286521708031_383613_15352'>
						<body>User name and user password is confirmed. Status of the user is logged in.</body>
						<language>English</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286174445457_392147_15818' name='Check user availability'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307536_564299_3586'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286522619038_645232_14901'>
						<body>Selected user should be active user and information should be editable.</body>
						<language>English</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286456202532_620626_15187' name='Check user and course associations'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307520_872580_3580'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286522561834_200587_14900'>
						<body>a course can not be removed if 5 or more students are associated with the course.</body>
						<language>English</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286456326163_338754_15199' name='Check user password length'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307520_446265_3583'/>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_17_0beta_9150291_1285219307536_564299_3586'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286513690520_106670_15241'>
						<body>Length of the password can not be less than 5 symbols.</body>
						<language>English</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
					<modelExtension>
						<ownedDiagram xmi:type='uml:Diagram' xmi:id='_17_0beta_9150291_1286172868833_496478_3577' name='Constraints in Generic Table' visibility='public' ownerOfDiagram='_17_0beta_9150291_1287059388792_713362_16239'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 19.0 beta'>
